scripts.build: npm run build -w @project-design-planner/planner-core && npm run build -w @project-design-planner/mcp-server && npm run build -w apps/vscode-extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @project-design-planner/planner-core && npm run build -w @project-design-planner/planner-core && npm run test -w @project-design-planner/mcp-server && npm run test -w apps/vscode-extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @project-design-planner/planner-core && npm run build -w @project-design-planner/planner-core && npm run typecheck -w @project-design-planner/mcp-server && npm run typecheck -w apps/vscode-extension
